title: Fit Test - Tab is present and accessible in Device Settings
scenario: Fit Test tab is present and accessible in Device Settings for Voyager Free 60+ and Voyager Free 20
steps: 1. Connect a supported device (e.g., Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Free 20) to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, locate the Fit Test tab.
6. Confirm that the Fit Test screen opens and is fully accessible.
expected: The Fit Test tab is present in Device Settings for supported devices. Tapping it opens the Fit Test screen successfully.
